claims.check: required CI fix commit is an ancestor of HEAD and current pnpm workspace retains the required ignored build dependency
claims.replay_command: git merge-base --is-ancestor 81af2bb2b95ef8919c863cc927d40d2c69627be6 HEAD && test "$(git show HEAD:pnpm-workspace.yaml | rg -c '@google/genai')" -eq 1

claims.check: composition-path commit is an ancestor of HEAD and current lint source, CLI, docs, and tests contain compositionPaths
claims.replay_command: git merge-base --is-ancestor ded1f6bac09423398bb473a645debd1bf61c9474 HEAD && test -f pkg/tool/lint/src/cli.ts && test -f pkg/tool/lint/src/index.ts && test -f pkg/tool/lint/tests/cli.test.ts && test -f pkg/tool/lint/tests/scanner.test.ts && test -f pkg/tool/lint/README.md && rg -q 'compositionPaths' pkg/tool/lint/src/cli.ts pkg/tool/lint/src/index.ts pkg/tool/lint/tests/cli.test.ts pkg/tool/lint/tests/scanner.test.ts pkg/tool/lint/README.md
claims.source_command: git merge-base --is-ancestor ded1f6ba HEAD; rg -n 'composition|paths|projects' pkg/tool/lint/src/cli.ts pkg/tool/lint/src/index.ts pkg/tool/lint/tests/cli.test.ts pkg/tool/lint/tests/scanner.test.ts pkg/tool/lint/README.md

claims.check: Lite CLI removal commit is an ancestor of HEAD, package bin is absent, removed CLI source and executable are absent, and migration evidence remains
claims.replay_command: git merge-base --is-ancestor 55b7d922a4330adc195bbf16b5616e5730e22da2 HEAD && node -e "const p=require('./pkg/core/lite/package.json'); if ('bin' in p) process.exit(1)" && test ! -e pkg/core/lite/src/cli.ts && test ! -e pkg/core/lite/bin/pumped-lite.mjs && rg -q 'CLI removal' pkg/core/lite/MIGRATION.md
claims.source_command: git merge-base --is-ancestor 55b7d922 HEAD; node -e "const p=require('./pkg/core/lite/package.json'); if ('bin' in p) process.exit(1)"; test ! -e pkg/core/lite/src/cli.ts; test ! -e pkg/core/lite/bin/pumped-lite.mjs; rg -n 'CLI|removed|@pumped-fn/lite-cli' pkg/core/lite/MIGRATION.md pkg/core/lite/README.md pkg/core/lite/package.json
claims.threshold: ancestor_exit == 0 and package_bin_absent == true and removed_path_count == 2 and migration_match_count > 0

claims.check: performance harness commit is an ancestor of HEAD and current main contains the reproducible harness, fixture rows, tests, and README
claims.replay_command: git merge-base --is-ancestor 9fcb7229fc4b3774f55ff4c708446f5f5b2d44e9 HEAD && test -f benchmarks/lite-perf/scripts/harness.mjs && test -f benchmarks/lite-perf/scripts/harness.test.mjs && test -f benchmarks/lite-perf/rows.json && test -f benchmarks/lite-perf/README.md
claims.source_command: git merge-base --is-ancestor 9fcb7229 HEAD; test -f benchmarks/lite-perf/scripts/harness.test.mjs && test -f benchmarks/lite-perf/rows.json && test -f benchmarks/lite-perf/README.md; git rev-parse HEAD:benchmarks/lite-perf

claims.check: sdk-mcp base and corrective commits are ancestors of HEAD and current main contains the package implementation, tests, package manifest, workspace registration, and docs
claims.replay_command: git merge-base --is-ancestor bafd22ca7d3446b512687438aefd7b5264ed6049 HEAD && git merge-base --is-ancestor 202d316b6c47116980f776b6762a395e0d940427 HEAD && git merge-base --is-ancestor 62b23dc0e66c6dbc44321fe3edc3db5152f61dba HEAD && git merge-base --is-ancestor b4101667bdd75be22bfd21376e219f091b3842c4 HEAD && test -f pkg/sdk/mcp/src/index.ts && test -f pkg/sdk/mcp/tests/mcp.test.ts && test -f pkg/sdk/mcp/package.json && rg -q '@pumped-fn/sdk-mcp' README.md pkg/sdk/README.md pkg/sdk/mcp/package.json
claims.source_command: for c in bafd22ca 202d316b 62b23dc0 b4101667; do git merge-base --is-ancestor $c HEAD; done; test -f pkg/sdk/mcp/src/index.ts && test -f pkg/sdk/mcp/tests/mcp.test.ts && test -f pkg/sdk/mcp/package.json; rg -n 'pkg/sdk/mcp|@pumped-fn/sdk-mcp' pnpm-workspace.yaml pkg/sdk/mcp/package.json README.md pkg/sdk/README.md; git rev-parse HEAD:pkg/sdk/mcp

claims.check: shipped skill commit is an ancestor of HEAD and current skills/pumped-fn tree exactly equals the intended skill payload on source branch 0ec0efff; source-only OKRA evaluation files are excluded from the product-unit denominator
claims.replay_command: git merge-base --is-ancestor a732c339d081d6810e7f616a888528f17f1997e4 HEAD && git diff --quiet 0ec0efff HEAD -- skills/pumped-fn && test "$(git rev-parse 0ec0efff:skills/pumped-fn)" = "$(git rev-parse HEAD:skills/pumped-fn)"
claims.source_command: git merge-base --is-ancestor a732c339 HEAD; git diff --quiet 0ec0efff HEAD -- skills/pumped-fn; git rev-parse 0ec0efff:skills/pumped-fn; git rev-parse HEAD:skills/pumped-fn; base=$(git merge-base HEAD 0ec0efff); git diff --name-only $base..0ec0efff | awk prefix counts
claims.threshold: ancestor_exit == 0 and scoped_diff_exit == 0 and source_tree == main_tree

synchronization.source_command: git rev-parse HEAD; git rev-parse origin/main; test "$(git rev-parse HEAD)" = "$(git rev-parse origin/main)"
